treasure.header.title: Hidden Treasure
treasure.header.subtitle: Hunter: Montmartre
treasure.compass.pressure.far: The city hasn't noticed you yet.
treasure.compass.return.prompt1: What has changed since you were last here?
treasure.compass.return.prompt2: What did you expect to find that is gone?
treasure.compass.proofModal.title: Proof moment
treasure.compass.proofModal.body: One photo is enough. No location is stored. Send the proof, and the city will answer.
treasure.compass.inscribed.title: Inscribed
treasure.compass.inscribed.line2: The city will echo in a few hours.
treasure.location.weak: Signal too weak — step into the open.
presence.weak: Signal too weak — step into the open.
presence.cooldown: Wait a moment before verifying again.
presence.outside: You are not in the expected place.
treasure.gps.onSite: You are on site. Symbol validated.
treasure.gps.fallback: No problem — answer a question to validate.
treasure.errors.notOnSite: Hmm, that's not what I see… Are you really on site?
treasure.generic.solveFirst: To reveal the clue, you must first solve the riddle.
treasure.generic.findAndReturn: Find this symbol, then come back here to prove your discovery.
treasure.generic.onSiteOnly: Proof answers can only be found on site.
treasure.final.title: Guardian of Montmartre
treasure.final.line1: You have uncovered all the secrets of the Butte.
treasure.final.line2: Montmartre recognizes you as one of its own.

treasure.symbols.name: The Man Who Walked Through Walls
treasure.symbols.riddle: I pass through walls, yet I am frozen for eternity. Marcel created me, Marais sculpted me. Who am I?
treasure.symbols.clue: Place Marcel Aymé, at the end of Rue Norvins. A man emerges from the wall, caught between two worlds.
treasure.symbols.proof: Which hand is the Passe-Muraille coming out with? (left/right)

treasure.symbols.name: The Rooster Sundial
treasure.symbols.riddle: QUAND SONNERA JE CHANTERAY — but one letter rebelled; it faces the other way.
treasure.symbols.clue: Rue de l'Abreuvoir, on a discreet façade. A sundial where the N refuses to follow the others.
treasure.symbols.proof: Which letter is inverted on the dial? (one letter)

treasure.symbols.name: The Witch's Rock
treasure.symbols.riddle: In a garden closed to passersby, a raw stone refuses to be polished by civilization.
treasure.symbols.clue: Avenue Junot, behind a gate. Montmartre's wild garden hides an ancient rock.
treasure.symbols.proof: What is the dominant color of the gate protecting the garden? (one word)

treasure.symbols.name: The Sacred Vine
treasure.symbols.riddle: Wine still grows on the Butte. Each autumn, the harvest recalls that Paris was once countryside.
treasure.symbols.clue: Rue des Saules, corner of Rue Saint-Vincent. Clos Montmartre — the last vineyard in Paris.
treasure.symbols.proof: What is the name of the famous cabaret right next to the vine? (two words)
